City Park Gaming and Brew Room


Weekly Events

Wednesday - Open Mic Night: 6:00pm to 10:00pm
Hosted By: Jeremy Norris

Stop by for some chill jams with local musicians. Play an instrument or sing? Come join in and play some tunes!

Thursday - MTG Open Play: 6:00pm to 10:00pm
Hosted By: Taylor Stetson

Test your MTG decks at CPGB! Play Commander or Standard, form a pod, and start slinging those spells!

Sunday - Weekly Trivia: 4:00pm to 6:00pm
Hosted By: Reid Wraase

How's your knowledge on everything and anything? Learn and Compete in teams against General Trivia. 1st place gets 4 free drafts, 2nd place gets 2 free drafts, and 3rd place gets 1 free draft.

Bi-Weekly Event
Tuesday - MTG Pick 2 Drafts: 5:00pm to 9:00pm

$30-$35 to participate. Open packs, pick 2 cards and pass to the next person, keep going until there are no more cards, then craft a standard deck and battle for prizes!

Upcoming Events

Located at 133 East Main Street, Westminster, Maryland, 21157, Suite 1.

Call Us at 443-201-9570 and follow or join us on Facebook, Instagram, or Discord for news on upcoming events or releases!

Hours of Operation:
Monday - Closed
Tuesday - 2:00pm to 7:00pm
Wednesday - 2:00pm to 10:00pm
Thursday - 2:00pm to 10:00pm
Friday - 12:00pm to 10:00pm
Saturday - 12:00pm to 10:00pm
Sunday - 12:00pm to 7:00pm

Photos and code courtesy of Charlie McGraw
